title: EveryThingMorph
description: This mod adds two new enchantments: "Morph" and "Fly Sword".
body:
🌏 Description
Everything Morph

📦 What does this mod do?
This is a Forge mod that introduces a new gameplay mechanic centered around "Morph" enchantments.

Morph Entity: Enchant any item (weapon, tool, or even a block) with the "Morph" enchantment, then right-click to summon a humanoid companion bound to that item.

This companion will follow you, attack your targets, and even attempt to symmetrically place blocks where you do.

Its skin is customizable: If you have [CustomSkinLoader] installed, the companion will automatically attempt to load the skin matching the item's custom name (e.g., renamed on an anvil).

Flying Sword: The mod also adds a "Fly Sword" enchantment. Enchant a sword and right-click to summon a rideable flying sword, allowing you to soar through the skies!

❤️ Why should you download it?
Never Feel Alone: Gain a unique companion tied to your gear, making your adventures more engaging and fun.

Expanded Gameplay: Whether as a combat assistant, a building helper, or a mount for aerial exploration, this mod offers fresh new ways to play.

Deep Customization: By simply renaming an item, you can give your companion your own skin or a friend's, greatly enhancing immersion and personalization.

⚠️ Critical Information Before Downloading
Skin Mechanics: This mod does not upload any data itself. Skin loading depends on an optional mod, [CustomSkinLoader]. If installed, the companion will use the item's (custom) name to query skins from the skin sources you have configured in CustomSkinLoader (e.g., LittleSkin). If not installed, the companion will use the default Steve/Alex skin.

Server Environment: All features, including flight, run on the server-side, giving server administrators full control. If flight is a concern for balance, admins can easily disable it using standard methods (e.g., banning the item or enchantment).

Dependencies: CustomSkinLoader is not required for this mod to function, but it is highly recommended for the best experience.
